summary: Prashnakosh Logo Fix VERIFIED - Logo PNG is now SOLID OPAQUE (dark navy circle with P shield on black background). No transparency, no checkered pattern. All screens tested show clean circular logo.
critical_code_review_comments: BrandLogo.tsx correctly uses rounded-full + object-cover to display opaque image as circle
logo.png is 964KB solid opaque PNG - dark navy circle with shield on black background
No transparency artifacts - fix addresses root cause (fake checkered pattern baked into pixels)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Logo fix verified. The logo.png is now a SOLID OPAQUE image (not transparent). CSS rounded-full clips it into a circle. All user roles (Super Admin, HOD, Teacher) show clean circular logo with no white/checkered artifacts.

login_page_logo.description: Shield logo displays as clean dark navy circle with P shield - NO white background, NO checkered pattern, NO square edges

super_admin_sidebar_expanded.description: Logo shows circular shield + PRASHNAKOSH + JIGNYASA text, no checkered background

super_admin_sidebar_collapsed.description: Logo shows just circular shield icon, no artifacts

super_admin_users_page.description: Loads with content (Select School dropdown), NOT blank

page_headers_brandmark.description: Circular shield in page headers, no white box

logo_fix_verification.root_cause: AI-generated PNG had fake checkered pattern baked into pixel data (not real alpha transparency)
logo_fix_verification.fix_applied: Generated completely opaque image with solid black background around navy circle
logo_fix_verification.css_approach: img tag uses rounded-full + object-cover to display as circle
logo_fix_verification.visual_verification: All screenshots show clean circular logo with no white/checkered artifacts
